design_philosophy: Utilitarian, high legibility, and touch-optimized for outdoor field technicians (gloved hands, fast scanning). Strong visual hierarchy separating editable vs read-only fields. Minimum touch targets of 48px. High contrast.

headings.description: Sturdy, authoritative sans-serif for clear structural headers.

body.description: Highly legible, excellent for numbers and dense data grids.

monospace.description: Used specifically for Material Codes to ensure 0 and O differentiation.

scales.code: font-mono text-sm font-medium tracking-tight bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 rounded

primary.description: Safety Orange for maximum visibility outdoors and clear primary actions.

buttons.primary: h-14 w-full bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-bold text-lg rounded-xl shadow-sm active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
buttons.secondary: h-14 w-full bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 font-bold text-lg rounded-xl active:bg-slate-50 transition-colors

inputs.editable: h-14 w-full bg-white border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-xl px-4 text-lg text-slate-900 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-orange-500/20 transition-all
inputs.readonly: h-14 w-full bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 text-lg text-slate-500 cursor-not-allowed select-none
inputs.textarea: min-h-[120px] w-full bg-white border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-xl p-4 text-lg text-slate-900 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-orange-500/20

cards.list_item: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm active:bg-slate-50 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-3

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide border

structure.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 p-4 flex items-center justify-between
structure.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] pb-safe

image_urls.description: Modern warehouse background, to be used with a heavy dark or white overlay for the login screen.

icons.rationale: Duotone weight for clear, bold industrial look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 ratio over backgrounds. Safety Orange buttons must have white text.
accessibility.touch_targets: No interactive element should be smaller than 48x48px.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, list items, and status indicators must have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement an Expo/React Native style layout using web technologies if standard web, or standard Tailwind styling if PWA. Assume mobile-first viewport max-width (e.g. max-w-md mx-auto) if viewed on desktop.

All forms MUST have distinct visual differences between read-only fields (Código de Material, Cliente, Ubicación) and editable fields (Fecha, Entrega/Recogida, Total/Parcial, Comentarios). Read-only fields must use the 'readonly' input style.
The list view (~1000 items) requires virtualization (e.g., @tanstack/react-virtual or react-window) if performance drops, but start with standard optimized mapping. Include a sticky search bar.
Use Phosphor Icons for all UI icons (Sync, User, Warning, Check).
On the Detail/Edit screen, place the 'Guardar' (Save) button in a fixed bottom bar so technicians don't have to scroll to save.
Ensure the Sync status indicator is clearly visible on the list view header. It should toggle between 'Sincronizado' (Green) and 'Pendiente' (Amber).
